idea_ref: [T1.ARCH] ModernBERT-large ST3 enhanced — architecture comparison vs RoBERTa
hypothesis: ModernBERT-large vs RoBERTa-large on ST3 enhanced. RoBERTa hit 0.735 (exp_0073). ModernBERT's longer context may capture parent/title context better for scheme classification. Same config as exp_0073 but @512.
